prompts.proposer:
Call proposer_brief() FIRST. The tool output includes pattern_analyst_insights — use trend_champion, seasonality_champion, and insights.recommended_method_hint to bias your candidate selection toward non-mean methods. MUST propose at least 3 candidates including at least 1 non-baseline type. Return ONLY JSON per instructions. IMPORTANT: you MUST ONLY reference candidate names that appear in the tool output candidate_library; unknown names will hard-stop.
PATTERN ANALYST INSIGHTS: trend_champion='ONLY_DWT_svr', seasonality_champion='ETS', recommended_method='dba_combination'. Narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=2.05) and very high seasonality variance (0.999), indicating models capture patterns fundamentally differently. FT_catboost dominates as overall champion with lowest RMSE, while ETS/THETA excel at seasonality and ONLY_DWT_svr tracks trends best. The combination of high disagreement + high seasonality variance strongly supports DBA combination method to leverage diverse model strengths.

raw.proposer:
{
  "selected_names": ["dba_combination", "best_per_horizon_by_validation", "inverse_rmse_weights_k4_sh0.35", "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3"],
  "params_overrides": {"inverse_rmse_weights_k4_sh0.35": {"shrinkage": 0.35}, "topk_mean_per_horizon_k3": {"top_k": 3}},
  "score_preset": "rmse_focus",
  "force_debate": false,
  "debate_margin": 0.02,
  "rationale": "n_unique_winners=7 indicates diverse per-horizon winners, supporting best_per_horizon_by_validation. relative_spread_mean=0.248 (≥0.25) and rmse_spread_ratio=2.05 indicate high model disagreement, strongly favoring dba_combination as recommended by pattern_analyst_insights. n_windows=3 requires small top_k (k=3) with shrinkage=0.35 for stability. RMSE gap between FT_catboost (1925.9) and svr (6067.0) is ~215%, justifying inverse_rmse_weights over simple mean."
}

pattern_analyst.cot_narrative: Analysis reveals extreme model disagreement (rmse_spread_ratio=2.05) and very high seasonality variance (0.999), indicating models capture patterns fundamentally differently. FT_catboost dominates as overall champion with lowest RMSE, while ETS/THETA excel at seasonality and ONLY_DWT_svr tracks trends best. The combination of high disagreement + high seasonality variance strongly supports DBA combination method to leverage diverse model strengths.

RMSE gap between FT_catboost (1925.9) and svr (6067.0) is ~215%, justifying inverse_rmse_weights over simple mean.
